flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Emily Griffith Technical College rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.8k → $5.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Emily Griffith Technical College rose 24% between 2007 and 2010 (69.8% → 86.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Emily Griffith Technical College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (5.1k → 6.1k).
